title: bridge-esp32: replace 2 unwrap() calls with error handling
description: firmware/bridge-esp32/src/main.rs has 2 unwrap() calls (lines 159, 175). These will panic the device on failure. Replace with proper error handling.
notes: Development firmware uses esp_backtrace for debug info. Init failures genuinely should stop the device. For production: add LED error patterns and optional watchdog recovery.
close_reason: Replaced panic/expect with error logging and graceful degradation (LED blink pattern or continue loop)
